texto: I hear music that comes out of need, out of grief, sorrow, suffering and out of overcoming these things, as well. That journey to freedom still goes on today. It's an incremental change, the culmination of many events in your own life and the lives of your children and grandchildren.
explicacao: Citação de Kathleen Battle sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I hear music that comes out of need, out of grief, sorrow, suffering and out of overcoming these …” articula vida, change, music em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como luto e mudanca.

It's an incremental change, the culmination of many events in your own life and the lives of your children and grandchildren.
